title: TraceBundle
description: A complete, signed trace bundle for one IntentMesh run. Contains the prompt, the approvals that produced it, a summary, the five run artifacts, and an HMAC bundle signature covering all five artifacts. Bundles are deterministic: identical prompt + approvals yield a byte-identical bundle and signature. All property names are camelCase.

total.description: Total number of nodes in the intent graph.

allowed.description: Number of nodes with an 'allow' policy decision.

needsConfirmation.description: Number of nodes that required explicit user confirmation.

blocked.description: Number of nodes that were blocked by policy.

executed.description: Number of nodes that were actually executed (ran=true).

verified.description: Number of postcondition checks that passed.

approvals.description: Sorted list of approval tokens that were granted before this run.

intentGraph.description: The intent graph artifact for this run.

policyDecisions.description: The policy decisions artifact for this run.

executionTrace.description: The execution trace artifact for this run.

verificationReport.description: The verification report artifact for this run.

signedAudit.description: The signed audit artifact for this run.

bundleSignature.description: HMAC-SHA256 over the canonical (minified, camelCase) JSON concatenation of the five artifacts. Hex-encoded.
